items.label: Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written
messages: Good. Now let me create the `infra-interfaces.md` file with all the Terraform outputs, masking the sensitive `application_insights_connection_string`.
Now let me commit this file and mark the pipeline stage complete.

The infra-handoff phase is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:  ## Summary  **Created** `/apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md` with structured documentation of all deployed infrastructure outputs:  | Section | Contents | |---|---| | **Endpoints** | Function App, APIM Gateway, SWA, and Cosmos DB URLs | | **Resource Names** | All Azure resource names (RG, Function App, SWA, Cosmos, Key Vault, APIM) | | **Auth Config** | Entra tenant/client IDs, CICD client IDs, CORS origins | | **Cosmos DB** | Reuse notes from webhook-dispatcher, new `Tasks` container spec | | **Terraform Outputs** | Full table with sensitive values masked (`application_insights_connection_string` → `<HIDDEN>`) | | **Environment Variables** | Backend (existing + new `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE=500`) and Frontend vars | | **API Routes** | `GET /tasks`, `POST /tasks`, `PATCH /tasks/{id}/status` mapping through APIM |  Downstream agents (`backend-dev`, `frontend-dev`, `e2e-dev`) can now consume this file for endpoint URLs, resource names, and configuration values.

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written"

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
messages: Now let me explore the codebase structure to understand patterns.
Now let me check existing page patterns and the E2E fixture:
Good, schemas are already in place. Let me check the existing E2E tests and an existing page for patterns:
Now I have full context. Let me check the layout and CI/CD workflow:
Now I have everything I need. Let me create the Kanban board page:
Now update NavBar.tsx to add the "Task Board" link:
Now let me check if there are any CI/CD env vars I need to update:
Good, the env vars match. Now let me build to check for type errors:
Build passes. Now let me run Jest tests:
All tests pass. Now let me run lint:
All clean. Now let me write the E2E tests:
Now let me verify the E2E tests compile:
All 11 tests list correctly. Now let me do the post-change review and verify lockfile:
Lockfile is in sync. The review shows moderate risk with no breaking changes — all good. Now let me commit and complete:
Now let me leave the doc-note and mark complete:

Frontend development is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Summary  ### Created Files 1. **`frontend/src/app/tasks/page.tsx`** — Full Kanban task board with:    - Three columns: To Do, In Progress, Done (filtered from single `tasks[]` state)    - **HTML5 native drag-and-drop** with `draggable="true"`, `dataTransfer`, visual drop zone highlighting (`bg-primary/10 border-dashed border-primary`)    - **Same-column drop no-op** — skips API call when dropped on current column    - **Fallback status-transition buttons**: Start, Done, Back to To Do, Reopen    - **Optimistic UI** — immediate state update, revert on API error    - Proper accessibility: `role="list"`, `role="listitem"`, `aria-label` on columns    - New task form at the top of the To Do column using existing `Input`/`Button` primitives    - All existing design tokens (`bg-surface-card`, `border-border`, `text-text-primary`, etc.)  2. **`e2e/tasks.spec.ts`** — Three Playwright E2E tests:    - Create task → drag to In Progress → reload → verify persistence    - Button fallback: move task through TODO→IN_PROGRESS→DONE→TODO via buttons    - Same-column drop no-op: verify no PATCH request fires    - All tests include deep diagnostic interception (console errors + failed requests)  ### Modified Files 3. **`frontend/src/components/NavBar.tsx`** — Added "Task Board" `<Link href="/tasks">` after "About" link using existing `navLinkClass()` helper  ### Verification - ✅ Next.js build passes (0 type errors) - ✅ All 14 Jest tests pass - ✅ ESLint clean (0 errors) - ✅ All 11 E2E tests compile and list correctly - ✅ Lockfile in sync - ✅ No breaking changes detected by Roam review

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
messages: Now let me explore the codebase structure and existing patterns.
Good - schemas already exist and barrel exports are set up. Let me now check the remaining files I need to modify/create.
Good - cosmos.tf already has the Tasks container, OpenAPI spec already has the task paths. Let me check what still needs to be created.
Now I have a clear picture. Let me check for existing unit tests and the backend package.json to confirm dependencies.
Good. Now let me look at an existing unit test for pattern reference.
Now I have all the patterns. Time to implement. Let me create all the files.
Now create the unit tests:
Now create the integration test:
Now update the validate-app.sh hook:
Now update the deploy-backend.yml to add the app settings step:
Now let me run the tests to verify everything works:

Intent: The `@azure/cosmos` and `@azure/identity` packages are NOT installed despite the spec claiming they are from webhook-dispatcher. I need to add them to `backend/package.json` dependencies since they're required for the Cosmos DB client code to build and test.
All 39 tests pass (15 skipped are integration tests). Now let me run the build and type-checking:
All entry points load. Now type-checking and linting:
I need to fix the error codes to match the existing `ApiErrorResponse` schema. Let me check it and fix:
I need to use `SERVER_ERROR` instead of `INTERNAL_ERROR`, and handle the 429 case. Let me fix the error codes in fn-tasks.ts:
Now update the test to match the corrected error codes:
Now re-run the quality gates:
All 39 tests pass, type-checking passes. Let me also re-build and verify the output loads:
Now let me run `roam_review_change` to verify the impact of changes:
No breaking changes, moderate risk. The new files (fn-tasks.ts, tests) are untracked so not in the diff analysis yet, which is expected. Let me now commit and complete the pipeline.
Now commit the CI/CD changes (deploy-backend.yml is in `.github/` which requires the `cicd` scope):
Both commits succeeded. Now mark the pipeline as complete:

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Backend Development Complete — Summary  ### Files Created | File | Description | |---|---| | `backend/src/functions/fn-tasks.ts` | 3 Azure Functions HTTP triggers: `GET /api/tasks` (list), `POST /api/tasks` (create with 429 rate limiting), `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` (update status with 404 handling) | | `backend/src/functions/__tests__/fn-tasks.test.ts` | 20 unit tests covering all handlers: input validation, 404 handling, 429 limit enforcement, Cosmos DB error paths | | `backend/src/functions/__tests__/tasks.integration.test.ts` | Integration tests: CRUD flow (POST → GET → PATCH), 400/401/404 validation errors, `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE` az CLI control-plane check |  ### Files Modified | File | Change | |---|---| | `backend/package.json` | Added `@azure/cosmos` and `@azure/identity` dependencies (were missing despite spec claiming webhook-dispatcher installed them) | | `.apm/hooks/validate-app.sh` | Appended curl reachability check for `GET /api/tasks` with function key auth | | `.github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml` | Added "Set application settings" step injecting `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE=500` via `az functionapp config appsettings set` |  ### Pre-existing (created by infra/schema agents) - `packages/schemas/src/tasks.ts` — Zod schemas already existed ✅ - `packages/schemas/src/index.ts` — Barrel exports already included ✅ - `infra/cosmos.tf` — Tasks container already provisioned ✅ - `infra/api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml` — APIM paths already defined ✅  ### Quality Gates Passed - ✅ 39 unit tests pass (54 total including 15 skipped integration tests) - ✅ TypeScript type-checking (`tsc --noEmit`) passes with zero errors - ✅ esbuild bundles all 3 entry points successfully - ✅ All entry points (`fn-demo-login.js`, `fn-hello.js`, `fn-tasks.js`) load without errors via `require()` - ✅ No breaking changes detected by roam_review_change
